message.content:
@startuml
title Omit Representation

actor "Client" as C1
participant "==\nRepresentation\n==" as R1

C1 ->> R1 : PUT / POST / PATCH
note right of R1 #lightblue:**Header** Value \nPrefer return=minimal

R1 ..>> C1 : 204 No Content / 201 Created 
note left of C1 #palegreen :**Header** **Value** \nPreference-Applied return=minimal 

@enduml
